original text:
AmazonSmile -- Works All Year Round!
FOLCAS/Pick-Of-The-Litter was in attendance again this year for the annual Gleneden Beach 4th of July celebration and parade. A big Thank You goes out to Carol, Tony, Rosa, Lorinda, Christine, Erica, Emily, and Brian for their preparation and participation in the event. Thanks for representing our organization!
There is a bin at the Thrift Store, so bring it in! The food collected goes to the Pet Food Bank (pets of low income families) and Paws-On-Wheels (for home-bound pet owners; in conjuction with Meals-On-Wheels).
Location - 633 NE 3rd St., Newport - at the Fairgrounds. You can also drop off pet food in donation bins located at Ray's Market in Waldport.
2018 FOLCAS on July 4th at Gleneden Beach!
St Catty's Day was a big success!
Work continues at the new property. Safety changes and other modifications to building ramps, stairs, and other elements continue as FOLCAS prepares the new buildings for it major retail spaces and sorting centers. A new gravel drive is being added to provide a donation path for the West Building.
Let all your Amazon purchases support us! Go to smile.amazon.com and sign up!
We support the campaign to end cosmetic animal testing in the United States. The Humane Cosmetics Act is legislation to prohibit the production and sale of animal-tested cosmetics in the United States (H.R. 2790), and has strong bipartisan support . Let your Congressman know how you feel!
E-mail address - get on our mailing list!
​(That's Hwy 101 & Rt. 20, in the Interstate Bank plaza).
One coupon per customer, please.
You betcha! Join us for a chance to win an awesome Cat Quilt & Gift Package!
Quality surplus sales every Tuesday, Thursday & Saturday, 10-2. Large selection of clothes & linens--CHEAP! HOUSEWARES, BOOKS & HARDWARE--fill a milk crate for a BUCK PLUS!
Don't forget your furry family members at Easter!
2018 FOLCAS PROGRAM SERVICES TOTAL SETS 10th STRAIGHT ANNUAL INCREASE!
Available Now at Pick of the Litter and online -- that is, in the store(s) and on this website! Also, be sure to check the Calendar Contest page for a list of other calendar outlets all over the county.
Go to smile.amazon.com and Amazon donates!
You may like to know that is up 15% over last year!
Friends of Lincoln County Animals, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization providing funding and assistance to the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and help for other domesticated animals in the county.
The News Times informed us that "Pick of the Litter" was voted Best Consignment/ Thrift Store in Lincoln County!
